title: DocBlocks
description: DrWho meets Sugarcane - Fandom Mod The Shopkeeper, a Minecraft mod that meets the Whoniverse in it's own made to measure way.
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/YX3yaOw.png)

  
Welcome to our mod, DocBlocks is based in the Whoniverse but with the style of Minecraft with the connection to sugarcane.

This mod is based around a Time Lord called The Shopkeeper, this Time Lord as been missing for 1000's of years and as become a myth but
the Minecraft Universe has been altered for good because of The Shopkeeper, some say for the better, some say for the worse.

![Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/skqe3F8.png)

Our TARDIS is based in a custom Dimension, there is nothing else in this dimension, we have hidden two Airlocks on the TARDIS so you can use this to get out and create other farms or builds outside the main TARDIS. Our TARDIS s a one time thing, there is only one The Shopkeeper there for there is only one TARDIS. The future of the TARDIS and the player ownership will researched over time.
 
![TARDIS-1](https://i.imgur.com/DfoD7il.png)
![TARDIS-2](https://i.imgur.com/tdA0Kx2.png)
![TARDIS-3](https://i.imgur.com/M6icIxL.png) 

For now please use JEI or likes to get the recipes.
 


Older versions of DB before 1.16.5   
[Page Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/docblocks/pages/docblocks-info/old-docblocks)


Usage in mod packs:

      You may use this in you mod pack, if you do though please tell me so I can pass it on to the person I created it for so he knows who is using it.
